name: delphi-tools-raycast-extension
description: Run local design and text utilities from delphitools in Raycast

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the delphitools executable. Leave empty to use delphitools from PATH.

preferences.name: defaultOutputDirectory
preferences.title: Default Output Directory
preferences.description: Directory for generated files. Leave empty to use the system temporary directory.

preferences.name: cliDebounceDelay
preferences.title: CLI Debounce Delay
preferences.description: Delay in milliseconds before live commands run delphitools after input changes.

commands.name: encode
commands.title: Encode Text
commands.description: Encode text as base64 or URL encoding

commands.name: decode
commands.title: Decode Text
commands.description: Decode base64 or URL-encoded text

commands.name: hash
commands.title: Hash Text
commands.description: Hash text with MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, or SHA-512

commands.name: contrast
commands.title: Check Contrast
commands.description: Check WCAG contrast ratio between foreground and background colors

commands.name: harmony
commands.title: Generate Color Harmony
commands.description: Generate color harmonies from a base color

commands.name: colorblind
commands.title: Simulate Color Blindness
commands.description: Simulate how a color appears with color blindness

commands.name: simulate-colour-blindness-image
commands.title: Simulate Color Blindness (Image)
commands.description: Simulate how an image appears with color blindness

commands.name: barcode
commands.title: Generate Barcode
commands.description: Generate a barcode image from text

commands.name: clip
commands.title: Trim Transparent Edges
commands.description: Trim transparent edges from PNG images

commands.name: convert
commands.title: Convert Images
commands.description: Convert images between formats with optional resize

commands.name: favicon
commands.title: Favicon Generator
commands.description: Generate multi-size favicon files from an image

commands.name: crop
commands.title: Social Media Cropper
commands.description: Crop images to a social media aspect ratio

commands.name: impose
commands.title: Print Imposer
commands.description: Impose a PDF for booklet or n-up printing

commands.name: matte
commands.title: Matte Generator
commands.description: Place images on a square or aspect-ratio matte

commands.name: meta
commands.title: Meta Tag Generator
commands.description: Generate HTML meta tags

commands.name: tailwind-shades
commands.title: Generate Tailwind Shades
commands.description: Generate Tailwind CSS color shades from a base color

commands.name: line-height
commands.title: Compute Line Height
commands.description: Compute named line-height ratios for a font size

commands.name: paper
commands.title: Paper Sizes
commands.description: Look up paper size dimensions

commands.name: font-info
commands.title: Font File Explorer
commands.description: Inspect metadata from TTF, OTF, WOFF, or WOFF2 font files

commands.name: shavian
commands.title: Transliterate to Shavian
commands.description: Transliterate English text to the Shavian alphabet

commands.name: noise
commands.title: Add Noise to Images
commands.description: Add color noise overlay to images

commands.name: palette
commands.title: Palette Generator
commands.description: Generate color palettes using various strategies

commands.name: preflight
commands.title: PDF Preflight
commands.description: Analyze PDF for print-readiness issues

commands.name: qr
commands.title: QR Code Generator
commands.description: Generate styled QR codes

commands.name: qr-vcard
commands.title: QR Code Generator VCard
commands.description: Generate styled vCard QR codes

commands.name: regex
commands.title: Regex Tester
commands.description: Test regex patterns against text

commands.name: rmbg
commands.title: Background Remover
commands.description: Remove background from images

commands.name: scroll
commands.title: Seamless Scroll Generator
commands.description: Split images for Instagram carousel scrolls

commands.name: split
commands.title: Image Splitter
commands.description: Split an image into a grid of tiles

commands.name: svgo
commands.title: SVG Optimiser
commands.description: Optimise and minify SVG files

commands.name: trace
commands.title: Image Tracer
commands.description: Trace raster images to SVG vectors

commands.name: watermark
commands.title: Watermarker
commands.description: Composite a watermark onto images

commands.name: zine
commands.title: Zine Imposer
commands.description: Impose 8 images into a single-sheet mini-zine layout

title: Delphitools
author: abeldebruijn
